programs.title: Cold Case Files: Dead West
programs.desc: When a mystery woman's burning body is found in an oil field in 2006, the rural community of Kilgore and a determined Texas lawman show why you don't mess with the Lone Star State.

programs.title: Accused: Guilty Or Innocent?:4
programs.desc: A traveling nurse is pulled over for a traffic violation in New Mexico and is arrested for felony burglary carried out in her home state of Ohio. Is she a thug for hire or innocent with a rock-solid alibi.

programs.title: The First 48:26
programs.desc: Detective Angela Carter takes over the case of a missing teenage girl and wonders if the key to her disappearance could lie shockingly close to home.

programs.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans:1
programs.desc: Amid the vibrant chaos of New Orleans' Mardi Gras celebrations, gunshots shatter the festive atmosphere of the French Quarter, leaving a man dead.

programs.title: Homicide Squad New Orleans:1
programs.desc: Early on Sunday morning, Detective Tanisha Sykes Smith responds to a man found deceased from multiple gunshot wounds alongside a building in the Lower 9th Ward.

programs.title: My Strange Arrest:2
programs.desc: A look at some of the strangest arrests from across the country: a man takes an alligator grocery shopping; an alleged thief tries a strange tactic to mask his identity; and more.
